zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Retford是Sir Henry Retford of Killingholme和Mary的女兒，於大約1405年出生在英國。她和Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1471年5月26日在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國艾可素斯 奧肯登。

nameMeanings.name: Retford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Radford
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Radford (Devon, Nottinghamshire, Oxfordshire, Somerset, Warwickshire, Worcestershire), Raddiford (Devon), Ratford (Sussex, Wiltshire), Redford (Angus, Fife, Midlothian, Dorset, Sussex), Retford (Nottinghamshire), Rodford (Gloucestershire), or Rudford (Gloucestershire). Most of these placenames appear to derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + ford ‘ford’, though some are likely to derive from Old English hrēod ‘reed’ + ford (e.g. Rodford and Rudford (Gloucestershire)), and the Oxfordshire placename may derive from Old English rād ‘riding’ + ford, probably meaning ‘ford which can be crossed on horseback’. This English name has been established in Ireland (Wexford) since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Retford was born about 1405, in England as the daughter of Sir Henry Retford of Killingholme and Mary. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire. She died on 26 May 1471, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in South Ockendon, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Retford est née environ 1405, à Angleterre, fille de Sir Henry Retford of Killingholme et Mary. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire. Elle est décédée le 26 mai 1471, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à South Ockendon, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Retford wurde um 1405 in England, als Tochter von Sir Henry Retford of Killingholme und Mary geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Mai 1471 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in South Ockendon, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Retford è nata il circa 1405 nel England come figlia di Sir Henry Retford of Killingholme e Mary. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire. Morì il 26 maggio 1471, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a South Ockendon, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Retfordは約1405年にイギリスでSir Henry Retford of KillingholmeとMaryの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshireとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1471年5月26日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスソウス オクエンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Retford(은)는 대략 1405년 영국에서 Sir Henry Retford of Killingholme(와)과 Mary의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 5월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 소우스 옥켄던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Retford nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Inglaterra filha de Sir Henry Retford of Killingholme e Mary. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire. Ela faleceu em 26 de maio de 1471, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em South Ockendon, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Retford родилась около 1405 г. в местности Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Henry Retford of Killingholme и Mary. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire. Она умерла 26 мая 1471 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности соут оккендон, эссекс, Англия.
